bundles.label: Data catalog (this page)
bundles.methodology: Self-index for this app: each row points to a JSON bundle (or special tab). Use URL query `?tab=` and `?years=` to deep-link views.

bundles.label: Industry
bundles.methodology: Synthetic counts + trends for UI development. Replace with UW survey + LinkedIn rollups. The “public spotlight” chart is a **hand-curated demo** of how you might surface employers named in UW news or annual reports — not inferred from private profiles.

bundles.label: Post-grad education
bundles.methodology: Synthetic continuation rate, credential-type mix, trend, and **illustrative** grad/PhD destination counts (not a real UW tabulation). Replace with First Destination Survey or other UW-published tables.
bundles.disclaimer: Not from an official first-destination survey. Institution list is demo-only until you import real FDS / outcomes data.

bundles.label: International outcomes
bundles.methodology: **Post-graduation destinations (sample):** The chart “Where alumni went after UW” is a synthetic multi-year aggregate by country for UI demonstration only — not official UW migration or placement statistics. Replace via `ingest_international_destinations_csv.py` with your LinkedIn or survey roll-up. **IPEDS context:** DRVEF2022 field RMFRGNCN counts nonresident foreign students in derived fall enrollment — **not** where graduates moved after completing their program. **Open Doors context:** Rounded U.S.-level totals published by IIE Open Doors (https://opendoorsdata.org/) for scale only — not UW-specific enrollment or mobility.
bundles.disclaimer: The destination-country chart is illustrative demo data. The IPEDS bar is enrollment-related only, not career geography. Open Doors bars are national-level IIE aggregates — not UW counts. Do not sum or compare cohorts across these charts as one population.

bundles.label: World map (overlay)
bundles.methodology: Synthetic destination mix for the World map tab only. Not tied to the IPEDS bar on the International tab.
bundles.disclaimer: Illustrative flows for UI development. The “Other” bucket is not drawn as a single map point.

bundles.label: Visualize
bundles.methodology: Synthetic hierarchical cohort for the Vizualive bubble UI only. Each root’s `count` equals the sum of its `children`. Replace with verified path rollups from UW surveys or reviewed LinkedIn aggregates.
bundles.disclaimer: Not a census; paths like “UW undergrad → M.S. at Georgia Tech” are illustrative splits for UX testing.

bundles.label: Notable alumni
bundles.methodology: SPARQL against Wikidata: entities with P69 (educated at) = Q838330 (UW–Madison), with an English Wikipedia sitelink. Optional P18 image; Wikipedia REST summary for missing photos and for achievement badges (Nobel, founder, etc.) inferred from lead text. Not vetted for graduation or degree type; verify each source.
bundles.disclaimer: Automated list from Wikidata — not an official UW ranking, incomplete, and may include faculty or short-term attendees. Photos are Commons/Wikipedia-sourced; verify licensing for reuse.

bundles.label: Origins — Undergraduate
bundles.methodology: US states: IPEDS Fall Enrollment EF2019C–EF2022C (one slice per fall collection year), residence of first-time degree/certificate-seeking undergraduate students (freshmen cohort), UNITID 240444. Each `by_year` key is the EF collection year (e.g. 2022 = EF2022C). Foreign row (EFCSTATE 90): aggregated count only — IPEDS does not break out country here.
bundles.disclaimer: These are official IPEDS counts for the EF cohort definition above, not all UW undergraduates. Do not sum with other charts as a full enrollment census.

bundles.label: Origins — Graduate
bundles.methodology: Synthetic US state + country origin for graduate enrollment. Production: IPEDS Fall Enrollment / CDS by level (UnitID 240444 = UW–Madison).
bundles.disclaimer: Not official IPEDS figures; for UI development only.

bundles.label: Origins — Doctorate
bundles.methodology: Synthetic US state + country origin for doctorate enrollment. Production: IPEDS Fall Enrollment / CDS by level (UnitID 240444 = UW–Madison).
bundles.disclaimer: Not official IPEDS figures; for UI development only.

bundles.label: Peer outcomes (Scorecard)
bundles.methodology: Illustrative peer table for UI when COLLEGE_SCORECARD_API_KEY is not set. Numbers are rounded public-style benchmarks — not a live API pull. Set COLLEGE_SCORECARD_API_KEY and re-run this script for current Scorecard values.
bundles.disclaimer: Not UW internal career analytics. Earnings reflect institution-level Scorecard cohorts, not starting salary by major.

bundles.label: Research footprint (OpenAlex)
bundles.methodology: Illustrative peer-scale numbers for UI when the OpenAlex API cannot be reached (SSL, offline, or rate limits). Re-run this script on a machine with working TLS to pull live OpenAlex institution entities.
bundles.disclaimer: Fallback values are order-of-magnitude placeholders — not live OpenAlex pulls.

bundles.label: Rankings (hub)
bundles.methodology: Single bundle for the Rankings tab. Institution tables use Wikidata `P1352` with `P459` = QS World University Rankings (Q1790510) and ARWU / Shanghai (Q478743), taking the latest qualifier year per edition. **Global** deliberately includes non-U.S. universities (Oxford, Cambridge, ETH Zurich, Tsinghua, NUS, Toronto, etc.) alongside U.S. peers so the comparison is not U.S.-only. **U.S.** and **Public** are filtered views of the same metrics on subsets of that peer list (see `country`, `us`, and `public` flags in harvest_rankings.py). Majors: IPEDS C2024_A completions by CIP for UNITID 240444; optional `data/raw/major_ranks.csv` merges publisher ranks.
bundles.disclaimer: Wikidata ranks are community-sourced and may disagree with official publisher tables. Verify before citing. IPEDS counts are administrative completions, not program quality ranks.

notes: Major slices live under data/majors/*.json (Industry tab only).
